About Projects

Pickle Network Debugger

The Pickle Network Debugger (PKN.kt) is a network debugger and visualiser written in Kotlin. It is powerful and easy to use, with automatic probing and it is able to visualise traffic outside of the LAN.

PKN.kt features

  • Free and Open Source, forever
  • Traffic visualiser and debugger included
  • Ability to see external and internal traffic
  • Ability to see which devices/IP addresses send the most packets
Source Code
